creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
The screen shown after clicking File A Bug shows four categories:
Administrative Concerns:  	For concerns that relate to the project, its administration, or those with "hats".
Base System:  	Base System
Documentation:  	Documentation
Ports Tree:  	Ports Tree

It is not clear which category includes bug tracker issues.  I suggest changing the description sentence for Administrative Concerns:

Administrative issues, including the bug tracker and people with "hat" roles.
